EigenTorch API Reference¶

The following API exposes the comprehensive capabilities of the Eigen drop-in replacement library, seamlessly scaling matrix operations to massive GPU topologies via PyTorch.

Device Management¶

class DeviceManager¶

Public Static Functions

static inline void set_default_device(const torch::Device &device)¶
static inline torch::Device get_default_device()¶
static inline bool is_mps_available()¶

Public Static Attributes

static torch::Device default_device = torch::kCPU¶

Core Linear Algebra¶

template<typename Scalar, int RowsAtCompileTime, int ColsAtCompileTime>
class Matrix¶

Public Types

using ScalarType = Scalar¶

Public Functions

inline Matrix()¶
inline explicit Matrix(const at::Tensor &tensor)¶
inline Matrix(int rows, int cols)¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other)¶
inline at::Tensor &tensor()¶
inline const at::Tensor &tensor() const¶
inline int rows() const¶
inline int cols() const¶
inline int size() const¶
inline Scalar operator()(int row, int col) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator*(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator+(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator-(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> transpose() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> adjoint() const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Scalar dot(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> block(int startRow, int startCol, int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> block(int startRow, int startCol, int blockRows, int blockCols) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, 1, Dynamic> row(int i)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar, 1, Dynamic> row(int i) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, 1> col(int i)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, 1> col(int i) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseProduct(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseQuotient(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseAbs() const¶
inline Scalar sum() const¶
inline Scalar mean() const¶
inline Scalar maxCoeff() const¶
inline Scalar minCoeff() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar, Dynamic, Dynamic> inverse() const¶

Public Static Functions

static inline torch::ScalarType get_torch_dtype()¶
static inline Matrix Random(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Zero(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Ones(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Identity(int rows, int cols)¶

Friends

inline friend std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Matrix &m)¶
